parameters.query:
SELECT * 
FROM humanos_stories 
WHERE editorial_status = 'approved' 
ORDER BY updated_at ASC 
LIMIT 1;

=-- 1. Actualizar estado de la historia
UPDATE humanos_stories 
SET editorial_status = 'scripted' 
WHERE id = '{{$json.story_id}}';

-- 2. Insertar short_60
INSERT INTO humanos_scripts (
  story_id, script_type, version, status, title, hook, narration, 
  on_screen_text, scene_breakdown, closing_line, caption, pinned_comment, visual_notes, created_by
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.story_id}}',
  'short_60',
  1,
  'draft',
  '{{$json.short_60.title.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_60.hook.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_60.narration.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{JSON.stringify($json.short_60.on_screen_text)}}'::jsonb,
  '{{JSON.stringify($json.short_60.scene_breakdown)}}'::jsonb,
  '{{$json.short_60.closing_line.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_60.caption.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_60.pinned_comment.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_60.visual_notes.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  'Gabo'
);

-- 3. Insertar short_30
INSERT INTO humanos_scripts (
  story_id, script_type, version, status, hook, narration, created_by
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.story_id}}',
  'short_30',
  1,
  'draft',
  '{{$json.short_30.hook.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{$json.short_30.narration.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  'Gabo'
);

parameter.name: message
parameter.value:
=✍️ GABO TERMINÓ

El guion de {{$json.protagonist_name}} está listo para grabar.

Se insertó la versión de 60s y 30s en la tabla 'humanos_scripts' en estado 'draft'.
